mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, model_code, model_name, model_type, model_version, provider, status, released_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM model_registry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_registry ( tenant_id, model_code, model_name, model_type, model_version, provider, status, released_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{modelCode}, #{modelName}, #{modelType}, #{modelVersion}, #{provider}, #{status}, #{releasedAt} )
